vulnerabilities.title: Undefined Variable - SESSIONS_FILE
vulnerabilities.description: Variable SESSIONS_FILE is used but never defined, causing ReferenceError
vulnerabilities.impact: Application crash on startup/shutdown
vulnerabilities.fix: Add: const SESSIONS_FILE = path.join(__dirname, 'sessions.json');

vulnerabilities.title: Undefined Variable - MASTER_KEY_FILE
vulnerabilities.description: Variable MASTER_KEY_FILE is used but never defined
vulnerabilities.impact: Application crash when WEBSSH_SECRET not in environment
vulnerabilities.fix: Add: const MASTER_KEY_FILE = path.join(__dirname, '.webssh_secret');

vulnerabilities.title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in updateProfile
vulnerabilities.description: Username parameter lacks sanitizeInput() in /api/update-profile endpoint
vulnerabilities.impact: Account compromise via XSS injection through profile update
vulnerabilities.fix: Use: user.username = sanitizeInput(username);

vulnerabilities.title: Insufficient Password Validation in Update
vulnerabilities.description: Password complexity validation missing in /api/update-profile
vulnerabilities.impact: Users can set weak passwords, downgrading account security
vulnerabilities.fix: Add complexity checks (3 of 4: upper, lower, digits, special)

vulnerabilities.title: Insecure Temporary File Storage
vulnerabilities.description: SSH connections with decrypted credentials stored in plaintext JSON
vulnerabilities.impact: Private keys exposed in memory dumps, weak file permissions
vulnerabilities.fix: Use HSM/KMS for key storage, implement strict file permissions (0o600)

vulnerabilities.title: Broken Session Persistence
vulnerabilities.description: Sessions fail to load/save silently due to undefined SESSIONS_FILE
vulnerabilities.impact: Sessions not persisted across server restarts
vulnerabilities.fix: Define SESSIONS_FILE constant (see issue #1)

vulnerabilities.title: Improper WebSocket Origin Validation
vulnerabilities.description: WebSocket origin check can be bypassed or contains incorrect host comparison
vulnerabilities.impact: CSWSH attacks possible, bypass of Same-Origin Policy
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement proper origin validation with protocol checks

vulnerabilities.title: Weak CSRF Protection
vulnerabilities.description: Cookie-based CSRF tokens used; WebSocket connections lack CSRF protection
vulnerabilities.impact: CSRF attacks possible, especially via WebSocket connections
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement header-based CSRF tokens for WebSocket

vulnerabilities.title: SSH Private Key Passphrase Not Required
vulnerabilities.description: Encrypted SSH keys accepted without requiring passphrase for decryption
vulnerabilities.impact: Encrypted keys cannot be used; security bypass
vulnerabilities.fix: Check for ENCRYPTED marker in private key and require passphrase

vulnerabilities.title: Vulnerable Dependency - cookie < 0.7.0
vulnerabilities.description: csurf@1.11.0 depends on vulnerable cookie package
vulnerabilities.impact: Cookie header injection attacks possible
vulnerabilities.fix: npm install csurf@1.2.2 --save

vulnerabilities.title: Missing HTTPS Redirect
vulnerabilities.description: HTTP requests not redirected to HTTPS in standalone mode
vulnerabilities.impact: Connections possible over unencrypted HTTP
vulnerabilities.fix: Use reverse proxy (nginx) or implement HTTPS-only

vulnerabilities.title: No Absolute Session Timeout
vulnerabilities.description: Sessions have only inactivity timeout, no absolute maximum
vulnerabilities.impact: Sessions can persist indefinitely for active users
vulnerabilities.fix: Add SESSION_ABSOLUTE_TIMEOUT constant and check on each request

vulnerabilities.title: No WebSocket Binary Frame Rate Limiting
vulnerabilities.description: Rate limiting applies only to parsed messages, not raw binary frames
vulnerabilities.impact: DoS possible via large binary frames
vulnerabilities.fix: Check message size before JSON parsing

vulnerabilities.title: SSH Connection Timeout Can Hang WebSocket
vulnerabilities.description: SSH connections only have readyTimeout, no overall connection timeout
vulnerabilities.impact: Connections can hang indefinitely, resource exhaustion
vulnerabilities.fix: Add connectTimeout and overall session timeout

vulnerabilities.title: No SSH Output Size Validation
vulnerabilities.description: SSH stream output sent to client without size limits
vulnerabilities.impact: Memory exhaustion, client/server crash from large outputs
vulnerabilities.fix: Add MAX_OUTPUT_BUFFER and validate stream data size

vulnerabilities.title: Weak 2FA Rate Limiting
vulnerabilities.description: 2FA code verification uses generic loginLimiter, not per-user limits
vulnerabilities.impact: 2FA codes can be brute-forced more easily
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement dedicated 2FA rate limiter with per-user tracking

vulnerabilities.title: Insufficient Username Validation
vulnerabilities.description: Username validation missing checks for reserved names and unicode
vulnerabilities.impact: Reserved usernames allowed, potential homograph attacks
vulnerabilities.fix: Add RESERVED_USERNAMES check and unicode normalization

vulnerabilities.title: Timing Attack on Key Decryption
vulnerabilities.description: decryptSecret() has variable timing based on early returns
vulnerabilities.impact: Private keys can be extracted via timing analysis
vulnerabilities.fix: Always perform full decryption attempt regardless of checks

vulnerabilities.title: No WSS Enforcement
vulnerabilities.description: WebSocket connections not restricted to WSS (secure websocket)
vulnerabilities.impact: Connections possible over unencrypted WS protocol
vulnerabilities.fix: Check protocol and close non-WSS connections in production

vulnerabilities.title: Missing Security Headers
vulnerabilities.description: Some security headers not explicitly configured in helmet
vulnerabilities.impact: MIME sniffing, clickjacking possible
vulnerabilities.fix: Explicitly set all security headers in helmet config

vulnerabilities.title: No Rate Limiting on Profile Update
vulnerabilities.description: /api/update-profile endpoint has no rate limiting
vulnerabilities.impact: Password enumeration or account enumeration possible
vulnerabilities.fix: Add dedicated rate limiter for profile updates

vulnerabilities.title: Missing Audit Logging for Sensitive Operations
vulnerabilities.description: Some sensitive operations (like delete connection) not logged
vulnerabilities.impact: No audit trail for security events
vulnerabilities.fix: Add auditLog() calls for connection deletion and 2FA changes

vulnerabilities.title: Missing Cache-Control Headers
vulnerabilities.description: API responses lack Cache-Control headers
vulnerabilities.impact: API responses might be cached by proxies/CDN
vulnerabilities.fix: Add no-store, no-cache Cache-Control headers to all API responses

vulnerabilities.title: No Parameter Pollution Protection
vulnerabilities.description: No validation for duplicate parameters in JSON requests
vulnerabilities.impact: Potential parameter injection attacks
vulnerabilities.fix: Validate payload structure before sending
